# appendFieldSmartTags

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the appendFieldSmartTags mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk append-field-smart-tags --input.clientMutationId <String> --input.pFieldId <UUID> --input.pTags <JSON>
```
